topics.title: Artie's Health and Upcoming Roast
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie's recent illness versus rumors of drug use, the upcoming roast of Eric the Midget, and an incident involving a celebrity's phone number.

topics.title: Roast Targets and Media Segments
topics.summary: The studio discusses the ethics of roasting individuals with disabilities, recounts past television segments involving medical anomalies, and explores the origins of a comedy song by Dennis Leary.

topics.title: Artie's Absence and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses listener feedback regarding Artie's absence, the performance of guest Sarah Silverman, and various segments featuring JD.

topics.title: JD's Family Dynamics and Media Presence
topics.summary: The studio discusses JD's discomfort with his father calling into the show, the upcoming family reunion in Tennessee involving his mother, and the complexities of balancing personal life with public media appearances.

topics.title: Phony Phone Calls and Music Discovery
topics.summary: The studio discusses a complex prank phone call involving a man talking to his own voice, the discovery of deep-cut Beatles tracks on SiriusXM, and upcoming entertainment events in Las Vegas.

topics.title: Near-Death Experience and Religious Conversion
topics.summary: The studio features a caller who claims to have been clinically dead after an assault and asserts that God spoke to him during the experience, instructing him to abandon his gay lifestyle in exchange for a second chance at life.

topics.title: Engagement Rumors and Roast Plans
topics.summary: The studio discusses potential roast guests, the impact of 9/11 on the film industry, and a news report regarding Howard Stern's possible engagement to Beth Ostrovsky.

topics.title: Marriage and Engagement Ring Costs
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of marriage commitment, the high costs of celebrity engagement rings, and the personal considerations regarding legal protections like prenuptial agreements.

topics.title: Marriage Dynamics and Prenuptial Agreements
topics.summary: The studio explores the complexities of marriage, the role of prenuptial agreements in high-profile divorces, and the personal trade-offs between freedom and long-term commitment.

topics.title: Food Portions and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio explores the excessive food intake of a colleague, discusses recent legal issues involving a musician, and reviews celebrity news stories including a bicycle accident and a rejected request by Tom Cruise.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and News Updates
topics.summary: The show features segments on celebrity behavior, including Katie Holmes' shopping outburst and Jamie Foxx's generous tip, followed by news updates regarding local figures and upcoming entertainment projects.

topics.title: Super Bowl Predictions and Movie Reviews
topics.summary: The studio discusses Super Bowl betting odds, the performance of actors in recent films, and the search for a missing scientist.

topics.title: Super Bowl Weekend and Engagement Ring Advice
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming plans for Super Bowl weekend in Las Vegas, provides advice on the cost of engagement rings from a jeweler, and covers news regarding tortilla prices in Mexico and political commentary from Joe Biden.

topics.title: Current Events and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including Super Bowl ticket scams, the aftermath of an explosion scare in Boston caused by props for a cartoon show, celebrity ages at fatherhood, and various political updates regarding Iraq and executive compensation.
